title: parashorea malaanonan
intro: Parashorea malaanonan, also known as Philippine hardwood, is a species of tree in the family Dipterocarpaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Parashorea malaanonan include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections. The herbal preparation of this plant typically involves making a decoction or infusion from its bark or leaves, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
